rag_rules: Place AGREE assumptions and guarantees in component type scopes when they refer to component ports.
Use annex agree {** ... **}; blocks for AGREE contracts.
generic_rules: Input envelope assumptions should use concrete bounds or visible relations.
Output guarantees should relate visible outputs to visible inputs.
Helper declarations must match the actual types of expressions used.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts are enclosed in annex agree {** ... **}; blocks.
Component type annexes are for assumptions, guarantees, constants, and equations.
Avoid using implementation-only subcomponent paths in type-level contracts.
Boolean comparisons must align with the actual data type of the port.
anti_patterns: Do not reference AADL properties like Compute_Execution_Time as AGREE variables.
Do not convert Boolean domain values into integers unless the port is explicitly typed as bool.
Do not place implementation-level bindings in component type scopes.
irrelevant_topics: AADL property associations and timing constraints
Model fusion and owner/scope preservation rules
